name: locked-truth-finalize
description: Finalize locked truth with deterministic writer and command gates before SSOT/implementation work.

tasks.activeForm: Preparing final approved locked-truth draft JSON
tasks.detail: Create or identify $ATLAS_PROJECT_ROOT/$ATLAS_ACTIVE_IP/req/locked_truth_draft.json. It must contain requirements, obligations, contract_refs, and evidence_plan from the explicitly approved conversation/draft. The draft is not authority yet. Do not manually write canonical req/*.json files. Do not run workflow stages, dispatch_workflow, RTL, TB, SIM, lint, or coverage.
tasks.criteria:
$ATLAS_ACTIVE_IP/req/locked_truth_draft.json exists
The draft includes requirements, obligations, contract_refs, and evidence_plan
The user final approval source is explicit
No canonical req/*.json authority files were manually written
No implementation artifacts were modified

tasks.detail: Run the deterministic writer. Set ATLAS_APPROVED_BY to the explicit human approver before execution. This command is the only allowed way to write canonical locked-truth req files in this workflow.
tasks.criteria:
lock_requirement_set.py exits 0
req/requirements_index.json exists
req/obligations.json exists
req/contract_refs.json exists
req/evidence_plan.json exists
req/locked_truth.md exists
req/approval_manifest.json exists

tasks.detail: Run the deterministic bundle checker. Any failure means the workflow is blocked and must return to draft repair; do not continue to SSOT or implementation on a failed bundle.
tasks.criteria:
check_locked_truth_bundle.py exits 0
Manifest status is requirements_locked
Manifest hashes match disk files
Required requirements are locked/approved
requirement -> obligation -> contract_ref -> evidence_plan references close
locked_truth.md hash matches manifest

tasks.content: [REQ] Handoff: locked truth may feed SSOT only after gates pass
tasks.activeForm: Summarizing locked truth handoff to SSOT
tasks.detail: Read req/approval_manifest.json and report the locked-truth bundle paths, requirement count, bundle hash, and next allowed action. Only after the writer and validator gates are approved may /to-ssot or SSOT generation proceed.
tasks.criteria:
approval_manifest.json was read from disk
requirements_index.json path is reported
bundle_sha256 is reported
Next action is SSOT generation, not RTL/TB/SIM directly
No workflow stages were run during locked-truth finalize
